title: Flat USB A to USB C 5M Long Type C Charging and Data Transfer White Cable for Home Security Cameras, Dash Cam, Smartphones, Tablets and More
features: 【Details】5V 2A 10W for consistent and reliable power; USB A to USB C/Type C Cable with 25PCS Nail-in Clips and 8PCS Ties; Extra Cable Length: 5 m for flexible use; Flat design for tidy storage

【Extend Your Reach】We offer customized charging solutions in two lengths (3 m or 5 m) to fit various settings; Enjoy the freedom of long-distance charging, whether in your room, at your desk, or across your workshop
【Compatibility】Ideal for CCTV Cameras, Dash Cam, Smartphones, Tablets, and other USB-C-enabled devices without frequently replacing the batteries

【Unique Shape】Made of PVC material, waterproof design, suitable for indoor or outdoor use; Easily glide through doorways, window gaps, beneath carpets, and behind furniture; Provide a smooth and organized appearance for wiring in both home and office environments

【NOTE】This is a USB-A to USB-C cable, Please check that your devices are charged via USB-C before ordering; The actual charging speed depends on your devices and wall chargers; Your satisfaction is our top priority, If you have any questions, please contact us
